description: Receipt for the capitation tax (jizya) in Fustat for Mawhūb b. Ghālib, a Christian. Dated: 537 AH = 1142/43 CE (previous PGP descriptions gave the date as 514 or 517). There are two registrations marks; 'al-ḥamdu lil-lāh al-muʿīn al-dāʾim', praise be to God who is the steadfast supporter, and 'al-ḥamdu lil-lāh waḥdahu karīm niʿamuhu', praise be to God who is one, generous are his benefactions.
tags: tax receipt, jaliya, pinholes, jizya, DIMME
description_he: קבלת מס גולגולת (ג'יזיה) בפוסטאט למוהוב בן ע'אלב, נוצרי; 537 לאה = 1142/43 לספירה; שני רישומי הסמכה
